overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking through a rainy night in an Old West town. The character moves from an indoor warehouse through covered market areas into muddy streets illuminated by gas lamps, passing horse-drawn carriages and wooden storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor storage warehouse with stacked barrels and crates

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit warehouse between stacks of wooden barrels and crates toward the arched exit

entered.detail: large wooden barrels stacked in groups of three against the walls
rectangular wooden shipping crates and boxes piled along the left wall
large arched doorway with brick trim leading to the next area
thick wooden pillars supporting the warehouse ceiling
large sacks of goods piled on wooden pallets

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit indoor warehouse filled with stacked wooden barrels, crates, and burlap sacks. The space is narrow with arched brick doorways and wooden support pillars, creating an enclosed storage environment with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with wooden stalls transitioning to outdoor street

events.description: exits the enclosed warehouse into a semi-covered market area with view of the rainy street ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market area with wooden stalls, approaching the open rainy street

notable_agents.action: man standing near wooden crates observing the street ahead

entered.detail: exposed metal trusswork supporting the roof of the covered walkway
wooden market stalls and carts lined along the walkway
large windows with glass panes showing the rainy exterior
view of the muddy rainy street and gas lamps visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the warehouse into a semi-covered market walkway with metal roof trusses and wooden stalls. The space opens up to reveal a view of the rainy street ahead, with a man standing near crates on the right observing the weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy town street with gas lamps and horse-drawn carriages

events.description: character turns around and walks back toward the covered sidewalk area
horse-drawn carriage with red canopy passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy muddy streets, turning to explore different directions near a food stall and benches

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with red canopy moving along the muddy street

entered.detail: wet muddy street surface reflecting the gas lamp light
wooden carriage with red canopy pulled by horses
multi-story brick buildings with lit windows lining the street
tall cast iron gas lamps illuminating the rainy street
wooden food cart with oyster signage and white counter
wooden park benches sitting on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into the open rainy street, walking on muddy cobblestones past a horse-drawn carriage and an oyster food cart. The area is illuminated by cast iron gas lamps, with brick buildings lining the street. The character turns and walks toward a covered boardwalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden boardwalk with storefronts and benches

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered wooden boardwalk past lit storefronts, benches, and a menu board

notable_agents.action: man in dark coat walking along the boardwalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden roof structure providing cover over the sidewalk
storefront windows with warm yellow light glowing from inside
white painted menu board with black text listing items and prices
wooden benches placed under the covered walkway
ornate black lampposts with glowing lights along the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered wooden boardwalk sheltered from the rain, passing lit storefront windows and wooden benches. A man in a dark coat walks in the opposite direction, and the character passes a white menu chalkboard before looking out toward a park area with a large building in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a storage warehouse out into the rainy, lamp-lit streets of a frontier town. It begins within a dimly lit warehouse among stacked barrels and burlap sacks, moving through narrow brick archways and past wooden pillars. As the character exits the building, the space opens into a semi-covered market walkway with metal trusses and wooden stalls, revealing the rainy atmosphere and a bystander watching the weather. The scene then shifts fully outdoors onto muddy cobblestones, passing a horse-drawn carriage and an oyster cart under the glow of cast iron gas lamps before turning toward a sheltered boardwalk. Finally, the camera glides along the wooden walkway past lit storefronts and a passing pedestrian, ending with a view toward a distant large building in a park area.
